title: Scaffold Jetpack Compose App
description: Create a basic Android Compose skeleton with a MainActivity and build.gradle
prompt: Scaffold a new Android project. Create a 'app/src/main/java' directory. Create a 'MainActivity.kt' that extends ComponentActivity and uses setContent with a basic Jetpack Compose layout (e.g. a Text widget saying 'Hello World'). Also create a basic 'build.gradle.kts' in the root and in the 'app' directory.

title: Build a Calculator App
description: Generate a simple Python calculator script
prompt: Write a Python script named 'calculator.py' that defines a class Calculator with methods for add, subtract, multiply, and divide. Include a __main__ block that demonstrates its usage. Save it to the workspace and run it.

title: Find the Bug in my Script
description: Analyze a file for logical or syntax errors
prompt: Read the file 'src/main.py'. Analyze the code for any syntax errors or logical bugs. If you find an error, use the patch_file tool to fix it and explain what you fixed.

title: Fix Missing Dependencies
description: Find unreferenced imports and add them to Gradle
prompt: Read 'app/build.gradle.kts'. Notice if the Jetpack Compose Material 3 library is missing. If it is, use the add_dependency tool to inject 'implementation("androidx.compose.material3:material3")' into the dependencies block.

title: Research CameraX Setup
description: Browse the web to find the latest CameraX dependencies
prompt: Search Google for 'Android CameraX dependencies'. Extract the latest version numbers from the official Android Developer documentation. Return a final answer with the exact Gradle implementation lines needed.

title: Summarize Python Docs
description: Extract specific information from Python documentation
prompt: Navigate to 'https://docs.python.org/3/library/itertools.html'. Extract the visible text and summarize the usage of the 'itertools.permutations' function. Provide a brief code example in your final answer.

title: Refactor to Coroutines
description: Convert callback-based code to Kotlin Coroutines
prompt: Read the file 'CallbackManager.kt'. Use the explain_code tool to understand its current structure. Then, rewrite the file completely to use Kotlin Coroutines instead of interfaces. Write the new code back to the file.

title: Rename Project Files
description: Move and organize files in a messy directory
prompt: List the files in the 'src/old_folder/' directory. For every file ending in '.txt', use the move_file tool to move it to 'src/docs/'. Finally, delete the 'src/old_folder/' directory.

title: Grep for TODOs
description: Search the workspace for unfinished tasks
prompt: Use the search_in_files tool to find all instances of 'TODO' in the current workspace. Provide a summary list of the files and line numbers where they appear.

title: Initialize Git Repo
description: Setup a local repository and commit changes
prompt: Run a shell command to execute 'git init' in the current working directory. Then, run 'git add .', followed by 'git commit -m "Initial commit"'. Use the run_shell tool.

title: Check Git Status
description: List untracked files and branch info
prompt: Use the git_command tool with the argument 'status' to check the current state of the repository. Report back which files are untracked or modified.

title: Download Test Data
description: Fetch a JSON file from the web for testing
prompt: Use the download_file tool to download 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1' and save it as 'test_data.json' in the workspace. Read the file to confirm its contents.

title: Scrape Hacker News
description: Extract the top headlines from a news site
prompt: Navigate to 'https://news.ycombinator.com/'. Extract the visible text to find the top 3 headlines currently on the front page. Provide them in a numbered list.

title: Format JSON Files
description: Read, prettify, and overwrite a JSON file
prompt: Read 'config.json'. It is currently minified on a single line. Use the run_python tool to execute a short inline script that parses 'config.json' and rewrites it with an indentation of 4 spaces.

title: Check Environment
description: List system paths and variables
prompt: Use the get_env tool to check the 'PATH' and 'HOME' environment variables. Print them out clearly.

title: Compile Gradle Project
description: Trigger a build to verify compilation
prompt: Use the run_gradle tool to execute the 'assembleDebug' task in the current project directory. Wait for the build to finish and report if it succeeded or failed based on the output.

title: Write a Unit Test
description: Generate tests for an existing class
prompt: Read 'MathUtils.kt' which contains basic arithmetic functions. Generate a JUnit4 test class named 'MathUtilsTest.kt' covering the edge cases of these functions, and write it to the 'tests' directory.

title: Add Missing Docs
description: Generate Javadoc/KDoc comments
prompt: Analyze 'UserService.kt'. It lacks KDoc comments. Use the generate_code tool or patch_file tool to add professional KDoc comments explaining the purpose of each public function in the file.

title: Find a StackOverflow Answer
description: Search for a solution to a specific error
prompt: Search Google for 'Android java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Failed to allocate a 100 byte allocation'. Find a highly upvoted StackOverflow thread, read it, and summarize the best solution.

title: Remember API Keys
description: Store config strings in Agent Memory
prompt: Store the string 'sk-test-12345' into your memory under the key 'openai_api_key'. Then, list your memory to confirm it has been saved.
